description:
FERPA-compliant Bedrock Guardrail configuration for clAWS.

Blocks access to FERPA-protected student education record categories:
grades, enrollment status, financial aid, disciplinary records, and
student schedules. Also detects and blocks SSN patterns and student ID
patterns to prevent inadvertent PII exposure in query results.

Usage: deploy via CDK when the 'enable_ferpa_guardrail' context flag is true.
The FERPA guardrail replaces (not supplements) the base guardrail on
workloads processing student data.
name: claws-ferpa
blockedInputMessaging: This request involves FERPA-protected student data categories that cannot be accessed through this system.
blockedOutputsMessaging: The result contains FERPA-protected student data that cannot be returned.

topics.name: grades
topics.definition: Student academic grades, grade point averages, transcripts, or academic performance records
examples: Show me the grade distribution for this course

topics.name: enrollment_status
topics.definition: Whether a student is currently enrolled, their enrollment history, or registration details
examples: List all enrolled students in the program
Show enrollment changes over the semester

topics.name: financial_aid
topics.definition: Student financial aid awards, loans, grants, scholarships, or financial need assessments
examples: How much financial aid did this student receive?
Show financial aid distribution by department

topics.name: disciplinary_records
topics.definition: Student disciplinary history, conduct violations, sanctions, or academic integrity records
examples: Show disciplinary actions for this student

topics.name: student_schedules
topics.definition: Individual student class schedules, course registrations, or room and time assignments that identify a specific student
examples: What classes is this student taking?
Show me the schedule for student ID 12345
List all courses a specific student is registered in

regexes.name: student_id_pattern
regexes.description: Student ID pattern (letter followed by 7 digits)
